name: Brain Test Special
author: Poki
description: Brain Test Special is a tricky puzzle game that twists your brain in the funniest ways! Read each question carefully, think about the hidden meaning behind it, and get creative. Most answers are anything but obvious. You’ll need to think outside the box, tap, drag, and experiment to find clever solutions. Ready to challenge your mind and laugh at your own mistakes? How to play Brain Test Special? Click or tap to play! Who created Brain Test Special? Brain Test Special is created by Unico Studio. Find Hidden Objects , 2048 Balls , One Line Draw , Woody Sort and Word Monsters ! How can I play Brain Test Special for free? You can play Brain Test Special for free on Poki.
